ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solar_farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the solar farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the solar farm */,
  "capacity_kw" REAL /* Capacity of the solar farm in kW */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the solar farm was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the owner or organization managing the solar farm */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the solar farm location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the solar farm location */,
  "elevation_meters" REAL /* Elevation of the solar farm in meters */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the solar farm (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_generation" (
  "gen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy generation record */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar farm */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of energy generation (in 30-minute intervals) */,
  "expected_generation_wh" REAL /* Expected energy generation in Wh/m2 */,
  "min_output_at_95_confidence_wh" REAL /* Minimum output at 95% confidence in Wh/m2 */,
  "historic_variance" REAL /* Historic variance of energy generation */,
  "historic_normalized_variance" REAL /* Historic normalized variance of energy generation */,
  "actual_generation_wh" REAL /* Actual energy generation in Wh/m2 */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_ingestion_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was ingested into the system */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_generation_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES solar_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar farm */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of weather data (in 30-minute intervals) */,
  "temperature_celsius" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity_percentage" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed in mph */,
  "solar_irradiance_wm2" REAL /* Solar irradiance in W/m2 */,
  "cloud_cover_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in mm */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "data_ingestion_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was ingested into the system */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES solar_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar farm */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Time of forecast (in 30-minute intervals) */,
  "expected_generation_wh" REAL /* Expected energy generation in Wh/m2 */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of forecast (in percentage) */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the forecast (e.g., historical data, weather data) */,
  "forecast_generation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was generated */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the forecast data (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES solar_farms ("farm_id")
)
